heading: Southern California desert region integrated water and economic sustainability plan
label: 390h–23 Southern California desert region integrated water and economic sustainability plan

children.heading: Authorization
children.label: a Authorization
children.text: The Secretary, in cooperation with the Mojave Water Agency is authorized to participate in the design, planning, and construction of projects to implement the “Mojave Water Agency’s Integrated Regional Water Management Plan”.

children.heading: Cost share
children.label: b Cost share
children.text: The Federal share of the costs of the projects authorized by this section shall not exceed 25 percent of the total cost.

children.heading: Authorization of appropriations
children.label: c Authorization of appropriations
children.text: There is authorized to be appropriated to carry out this section, $20,000,000.
